name: khuym
description: Khuym: multi-agent coordination skills for planning, validation, swarming, and execution

interface.shortDescription: Validate-first skills for agentic software delivery
interface.longDescription: Bundles the Khuym workflow skills and standalone utilities for planning, validation, swarming, review, and learning capture.
defaultPrompt: Help me route a feature request through the full Khuym workflow.
Plan and validate a feature before we write code.
Run a review and compounding pass on completed work.
